evidence_summary: Execute a high-action escape sequence under darkness, transitioning the character from the palace interior to the exterior Zodanga streets. The sequence requires precise coordination of a leap, a physical impact with a glass wall for momentum redirection, a...
Under the cover of darkness, Carter makes his break for freedom. He leaps from a balcony, strikes a glass wall to redirect his momentum, and descends into the streets of Zodanga.

Suspense $\rightarrow$ Adrenaline/Release. **Likely Visual Coverage Families:** - Wide tracking shots of the leap. - POV or "follow" shots of the descent. - Extreme wide shot showing the scale of the city at night.
